entity.college_name: College of Language and Communication - Smart Village

establishment.parent_institution: Arab Academy for Science, Technology and Maritime Transport

overview.short_description: A specialized academic college within AASTMT focusing on language studies, media production, and communication sciences.
overview.current_status: Active undergraduate and postgraduate programs with practical media and communication training.

training_and_practice.description: Partnerships and MOUs with international universities allow students to complete part of their core courses or electives overseas to gain exposure and diverse experiences.

vision_mission.vision: College of Language and Communication - Smart Village aims to be a leading academic hub in language and communication studies, fostering innovation, research excellence, and global engagement. We strive to shape future professionals who drive positive change in the fields of media, translation, and intercultural communication.

decision_support.heuristic_basis_note: Decision-support values are heuristic estimates, not official university facts.

best_fit_traits: Enjoys storytelling, audience analysis, and communication strategy
Prefers project-based media production and editorial teamwork
avoid_if: You want mathematically intensive or highly technical coursework
program_profiles.summary: Heuristic profile for BA in Media derived from available program indicators and communication-focused study patterns.
differentiation_notes: Compared with BA in Digital Media, this profile leans less software and more traditional media communication.
Compared with BA in Language and Translation, this profile leans more field media production and creative content work.

best_fit_traits: Enjoys language structure, writing quality, and cross-cultural communication
Comfortable with reading-intensive and detail-oriented coursework
avoid_if: You prefer hands-on technical labs over language-centered study
program_profiles.summary: Heuristic profile for BA in Language and Translation derived from available program indicators and language-specialization patterns.
differentiation_notes: Compared with BA in Media, this profile leans more theoretical language mastery and less field production.
Compared with BA in Digital Media, this profile leans much less software and more linguistic specialization.

best_fit_traits: Enjoys creative digital production with platform-oriented publishing
Comfortable combining communication skills with digital tools
avoid_if: You prefer purely theoretical study with minimal practical production work
program_profiles.summary: Heuristic profile for BA in Digital Media derived from available program indicators and digital-content specialization patterns.
differentiation_notes: Compared with BA in Media, this profile leans more software/digital production and higher remote-work suitability.
Compared with BA in Language and Translation, this profile leans more creativity-design and digital content execution.

text_artifacts.cleaned_summary_text:
College of Language and Communication  Smart Village
Provide students with the basic knowledge and skills in all the fields of mass communication.
Prepare prominent media professionals of high level of knowledge and innovation and who apply the code of ethics of the media work.
Develop the communication skills to understand the international views and cultural pluralism.
Hold effective partnership with the stakeholders to reinforce the program.
Provide opportunities of creativity and innovation for all the teaching staff members and students.
Promote cooperation and care about getting the graduates' opinions.Vision 
College of Language and Communication - Smart Village aims to be a leading academic hub in language and communication studies, fostering innovation, research excellence, and global engagement. We strive to shape future professionals who drive positive change in the fields of media, translation, and intercultural communication.

Mission
CLC aspires to achieve sustainable development by equipping students with educational and training programs that meet international standards. Through the application of the highest quality standards and governance, the college seeks to qualify outstanding graduates who can contribute to a constantly changing workplacProf. Yasser El-Shamy
Dean of College of Language & Communication (CLC) - Smart Village
Welcome to the College of Language and Communication (CLC), Smart Village Campus!I am very happy to welcome you all to our College Website. It gives me great pleasure to lead the College of Language and Communication as I work hand in hand with faculty, staff, and students to bring the College to the forefront in the region. CLC has a well-established environment and state of the art smart premises. In this multinational, educational, and academic environment, students are educated to be exemplary leaders. The College and programs offered are accredited by the Ministry of Higher Education. The rigorous four-year undergraduate programs and high-quality education we offer equip students with the knowledge and skills to compete in a rapidly changing world. Our vision is to build the most active academic environment in the region and be a center of excellence in teaching, research, and training. We are here to bridge the gap between diverse viewpoints and critically examine both theory and practice, while seeking innovative ways to approach language, media, and communication locally, regionally, and internationally. Our students are well-acquainted with the global environment and emerge as future leaders through constant knowledge exchange, evaluation, and establishment of critical thinking. We aim to graduate professionals who are competitive, innovative, knowledgeable, and passionate. Graduates of our College

tie_break_rules.when: If final scores are close (difference <= 0.05), prefer closer campus to student's city.
If one option beats another by a meaningful margin (difference >= 0.12), choose the better option even if farther.
If top program is not available on student's preferred campus, recommend closest alternative within same program_family.
